name: Sonia Sanchez
abstract: Sonia Sanchez (born Wilsonia Benita Driver; September 9, 1934) is an American poet, writer, and professor. She was a leading figure in the Black Arts Movement and has written more than a dozen books of poetry, as well as short stories, critical essays, plays, and children's books.

concerts.label: A Cultural Tribute to Dr. William Edward Burghardt Du Bois
Sounds of Change

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Jang
about_quotes.evidence: So we did it with Max Roach and Sonia Sanchez the poet... with a multicultural ensemble.

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: Sonia Sanchez is mentioned only as an example of a poet whose work was included in books edited by Dominique de Lerma ('...poetry of black composers, whether it was Paul Laurence Dunbar or Langston Hughes or Mari Evans or Sonia Sanchez or whoever.')
